heading: Recovery of damages, etc., for antitrust violations on claim against person based on official action directed by local government, or official or employee thereof acting in an official capacity
label: 36 Recovery of damages, etc., for antitrust violations on claim against person based on official action directed by local government, or official or employee thereof acting in an official capacity
notes: References in TextFor effective date of this Act, referred to in subsec. (b), see Effective Date note below.
Effective DateSection effective thirty days before , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 24, 1984section 6 of Pub. L. 98–544section 34 of this title

children.heading: Prohibition in general
children.label: a Prohibition in general
children.text: No damages, interest on damages, costs or attorney’s fees may be recovered under section 4, 4A, or 4C of the Clayton Act (, 15a, or 15c) in any claim against a person based on any official action directed by a local government, or official or employee thereof acting in an official capacity.15 U.S.C. 15

children.heading: Nonapplication of prohibition for cases commenced before effective date of provisions
children.label: b Nonapplication of prohibition for cases commenced before effective date of provisions
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply with respect to cases commenced before the effective date of this Act.
